symptoms: Nausea and vomiting (morning sickness); Mild fatigue; Breast tenderness; Occasional headache
medications: Folic acid 5mg Once daily; Vitamin D 1000IU Once daily; Iron supplement 65mg Once daily
notes: Booking visit at 10 weeks gestation. G1P0. LMP confirmed by ultrasound – 10+2 weeks. BHCG 85,000 mIU/mL. Blood group A RhD negative – anti-D noted. Nuchal translucency at 11 weeks booked. FBC: Hb 11.4 g/dL, MCV 78 (mild iron deficiency). OGTT at 24-28 weeks planned.
diagnosis: Intrauterine pregnancy 10+2 weeks; Iron-deficiency anaemia in pregnancy
recommendations: Continue folic acid and iron; Avoid raw fish, soft cheeses, deli meats; Stay hydrated – 8 glasses water daily; Rest as needed; Anti-D immunoglobulin 1500 IU at 28 weeks; Next antenatal visit in 4 weeks
